chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 国家级产业基金出手，桥田智能获亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，上海桥田智能设备有限公司（下称“桥田智能”）已完成A+轮亿元级融资，由国家工业母机产业投资基金独家投资。资金将用于高端产能扩建、核心技术研发迭代及全球化市场布局。

桥田智能成立于2016年，专注于汽车主机厂机器人末端及周边设备，产品矩阵涵盖快换盘、磁力换模系统、修磨机、工业连接器等。公司此前已获吉利厚同、哇牛资本、美的资本、浙创投等产业资本投资。

公司创始人兼董事长刘小平拥有20年行业经验，曾任日本沙迪克生产厂长、技术总监，2010年曾创立桥田精密为KUKA机器人提供OEM服务。

公司去年底正式成为北京奔驰国产化快换盘设备供应商，并已主动出海对接德国奔驰及欧洲头部车企。2026年一季度则实现30%-40%增长。

chinese_news.title: 对话云鲸CEO张峻彬：理解人性，告别天真
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 黄楠

编辑 | 袁斯来

36岁时，云鲸CEO张峻彬意识到，自己不能再只做一个温和的人。

他做过一些得罪人的决定，但更多时候，张峻彬不善于说重话，以至于有人私下说他有些优柔寡断。“公司内部都说，要是彬哥对你的评价是‘还行’，说明你这东西已经很烂了。”他自己开玩笑。

过去几年，这种性格底色没有暴露太大短板。因为张峻彬更多泡在产品里，离琐碎而复杂的事务保持着一定距离。他喜欢自己做的事，也的确得以找到一角纯粹之地沉浸其中。

但一个产品经理终究不是CEO。成功的一把手可以放权、但不能让公司离手，并会在关键时刻手起刀落。“我以前太喜欢做产品了，也太温和，只做自己喜欢的事，不是一个合格的CEO。”张峻彬说。

也是在他埋头做产品的几年，云鲸内部的问题开始累积。你如果身处云鲸内部，会看到部门内耗，对接人不断更换，老员工相继流失。这些事看似分散，却最终指向同一个原因：没有一个人能将公司从上到下拧成一根绳。

最终，病灶还是摆到张

chinese_news.title: 消除“罪证”：给写作去除“AI味”的不完全手册（2026版）
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

做个测试。读一下这段话：

“熊猫是最可爱的动物，它最爱吃竹子，样子最憨态可掬，是世界上最珍贵的宝藏。”

如果你笑了，或者皱了眉，很明显，你的“鉴AI雷达”已经觉醒。 

近期把网友笑到打鸣的“豆包体”里，“最”是高频词汇。大家纷纷晒出自己使用、调教AI，结果内容啼笑皆非的截图。这场围绕AI味写作的调侃就此出圈。

chinese_news.title: 用AI重构增长：新通教育集团的实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
新通教育创始人麻亚炜坦诚分享了过去五年的转型历程——从数字化基建到全员AI Must，从AI in All到AI Native新业务。她的实践证明：传统企业拥抱AI，最难的不是技术，而是让战略从董事会走到一线。

麻亚炜将AI转型划分为四个递进阶段：

第一阶段（2021-2022）：数字化基建 完成底层数据与系统架构的夯实，为AI应用奠定坚实基础。

第二阶段（2023-2024）：AI Must 战略落地 通过全员公开课普及认知、孵化标杆小组树立典范、赴哈佛与斯坦福验证产品，将AI从"命令"转化为"共识"。

第三阶段（2025）：AI in All 深度嵌入 将AI融入所有关键业务流程，构建覆盖全链路的"AI全家桶"与数字员工体系，实现效率与体验的双重跃升。

第四阶段（2026）：AI Native 原生创新 以AI原生思维开辟全新业务赛道，完成从"工具赋能"到"基因重塑"的质变。

核心启示： 真正的AI转型，不

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD via spot ETF (or BTC perps) into U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz peace deal (oil down = macro relief = risk-on BTC); exit on resolution or 2026-09-30.
supporting_signals: Petraeus: 'Iran is in the process of blinking'; negotiations 'proceeding nicely' (Trump).
Oil risk premium built in (Brent +2%); resolution unwinds geopolitical bid, freeing capital for risk assets.
Bitcoin ETF outflows signal capitulation; institutional buyers waiting for macro clarity before re-entry.
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran talks collapse, U.S. escalates strikes, Strait closes, oil spikes to $110+, BTC corrects on inflation scare; Netanyahu's Hezbollah intensification also derails ceasefire momentum.
investment_theses.expression: iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) or Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust (BTC), or 3x leveraged long BTC/USD perp on Hyperliquid with 2% stop-loss below $75K

investment_theses.thesis: Long USDC yield / Short DXY (Dollar Index): stablecoin market $322B now exceeds FX reserves of 95 nations; if Fed cuts rates or inflation data rolls over, USDC yield compresses, driving capital into BTC/crypto and weakening USD relative to high-yield EM assets.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Stablecoin market cap $322 billion (milestone narrative).
CNBC: Americans 'entrenched' in financial stress; nonprofits help with debt management (recession risk rising).
Indonesia bans Polymarket (regulatory fragmentation); USDC becomes preferred settlement layer outside TradFi rails.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed stays hawkish, USDC yield stays elevated, capital flows into high-yield stablecoins (not crypto), DXY remains strong; geopolitical shock (Iran escalation) triggers flight-to-safety USD bid.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC/USDT ratio via Curve protocol (USDC yield farm), or short DXY spot via forex ETF (e.g., Invesco DB USD Index Bullish—UUP alternative: own leveraged long).

investment_theses.thesis: Short European equities (EWU, EWG, EWI) vs. long U.S. Tech (QQQ, NVDA): Ukraine escalation (Russia threatens 'systematic Kyiv strikes') + Middle East uncertainty (Israel-Hezbollah, U.S.-Iran) = Europe defensiveness; AI/tech narratives remain U.S.-centric (Hacker News: AI agents, code; 36Kr: AI agents, marketing automation).
supporting_signals: CNBC: European stocks edge lower amid U.S.-Iran peace talks uncertainty; Russia threatens Kyiv.
BBC: Netanyahu intensifies Hezbollah strikes; Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes.
Hacker News: AI agents trending; 36Kr: Watermark smart agents, AI content industrialization (all U.S./China narratives, not Europe).
investment_theses.counter_view: EU defense spending surges (NATO spending target met), European tech stocks rally; peace deal in Ukraine/Iran triggers risk-on European equity revaluation.
investment_theses.expression: Short EWU (iShares MSCI UK ETF) / long QQQ (Invesco QQQ Trust) via pair trade, or single short EWU with 2% stop above 36-day MA

investment_theses.thesis: Long NEAR Protocol (NEAR): cross-chain product activity fuels 15% rally; Hyperliquid competing with Polymarket suggests on-chain prediction markets are going mainstream; NEAR's interop narrative is underpriced vs. Solana/Ethereum layer-1 competition.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: NEAR price rally gains momentum; cross-chain product activity fuels 15% jump.
CoinDesk: Hyperliquid takes a swing at Polymarket—suggests macro betting volume is migrating on-chain.
36Kr: AI agents and cross-chain automation narratives (NEAR bridges fit this thesis).
investment_theses.counter_view: NEAR is a mid-tier L1 with lower TVL than Solana/Ethereum; 15% rally may be overextended; cross-chain bridges remain risky (Kelp DAO suffered $293M hack).
investment_theses.expression: NEAR/USD spot via Coinbase, or NEAR/ETH ratio trade via Binance (lever up ratio if confidence in interop thesis)

investment_theses.thesis: Long premium materials / memory chips (MU, SK Hynix ADR) on AI server buildout cycle: Hacker News trending 'Norway's 2 petabytes of Huawei flash storage for LLM training'; U.S. still targeting China chip exports, creating supply scarcity premium for non-China DRAM/NAND.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: Norway 2PB Huawei flash storage for LLM training (data center capex signal).
36Kr: Multiple AI training/content generation projects ramping (Qiutan, Jellyfish, etc.); all require memory.
Bitmine Russell 3000 inclusion hints at crypto-adjacent mining beneficiaries; chip supply is bottleneck.
investment_theses.counter_view: AI training cycle peaks, capex deflates; China announces own DRAM/NAND breakthroughs (e.g., Changxin/Yangtze Memory), flooding market; semis cyclical downturn ahead.
investment_theses.expression: Micron Technology (MU) spot or call spreads (buy Jun 2026 $100 call / sell $110 call); or semiconductor sector ETF (SMH, XSD) with 3–6 month hold
